title: KLE Campus Swimming Pool Quotation
amountInWords: Seventeen Lakh Forty Thousand Five Hundred Rupees Only
terms:
1. Single phase connection up to the plant room is in your scope of work.
2. Back wash line after the plant room and water supply to balance tank is in your scope.
3. All civil works mentioned above are at our scope.
4. Rates are valid for 30 days from the date of quotation.
paymentTerms:
1. 30% payment along with the PO.
2. 30% payment after bar bending.
3. 30% during tile fixing work.
4. 10% on successful commissioning and testing.

sections.title: Section C – Pool Starter & Control Panel

items.description:
Providing supply of Bobbin Wound Fiber Glass Sand Filters Max. Velocity 50 m/hr. Dia: 1200 mm, Flow Rate: 12 m3/hr fitted with 06 way multiport valve fitted with pressure gauge panel, manual air bleeder, UV resistance surface.

MAKE : AQVASTAR- Singapore, HORNER Xpress Aquatix - US

Single Stage Self Priming Centrifugal Horizontal Pump with prefilter in Techno Polymer. Motor with 1.5 HP, 1 Phase, 230 V, 2900 RPM, 50 Hz. IP 55 protection and Insulation class F.

MAKE : BLUE LATON / POOL MAXX

Supply of Ceramic or Glass Mosaic pool tiles, 1x1 inch, Sky Blue color for total area 1100 Sft.

MAKE : AQVASTAR / KAJARIA
